title: ranunculus bullatus subsp. supranudus
intro: Ranunculus bullatus subsp. supranudus, a lesser-known subspecies of the Ranunculus bullatus plant, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family, Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus bullatus subsp. supranudus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the roots or leaves in water or oil, which can be used topically to apply the medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
